etymology.description: иҫ¶(иҫө) (walk; movement) + еҶ“(еҶ“) (phonetically related) = to meet; to encounter
etymology.interpretation: In йҒҳ(йҒҳ) (gГІu, 'to meet; to encounter'), the character combines the semantic component иҫ¶(иҫө) (chuГІ, 'walk; movement'), suggesting an action or motion, with еҶ“(еҶ“) (gГІu, phonetically related), depicting the phonetic element. This combination indicates the concept of encountering or meeting in the sense of coming across something while moving.
